name: Linear
tagline: The product development system for teams and agents.
summary: Linear is a software development tool designed to enhance product planning and building processes, leveraging AI to improve team workflows. Founded in 2019, it has quickly become the preferred choice for over 33,000 companies, including notable names like OpenAI and Coinbase. The platform focuses on providing a structured environment for teams and AI agents to collaborate effectively, aiming to restore clarity and momentum in product development.

facts.label: Key Features
facts.value: AI-powered workflows, issue tracking, project management

weaknesses: Limited brand recognition compared to established competitors
opportunities: Increasing demand for AI-driven tools in software development
threats: Intense competition from established project management tools
Rapid technological changes in software development

sources.title: Linear – The system for product development
